title: GC old R2 model copies in cubric-builds/models/ltx-2.3 (post MPI-137)
description: Follow-up to MPI-137 (R2 bucket reorg, shipped). The LTX-2.3 weights were copied to cubric-models/vision and all consumer URLs swapped (dependencies.js de59499 + install_models_ltx23.sh ee9bdae, verified HEAD-200). The OLD copies still sit in cubric-builds/models/ltx-2.3/ - step d of MPI-137 = delete them to reclaim R2 storage. USER-GATED: confirm the new host has served live for a while + the URL-swap commits are pushed BEFORE deleting (no rollback once GC'd). One rclone delete of cubric-builds/models/ltx-2.3/.
